name: barcode-generator-smoke-tests
description: Automated smoke tests for the 10-language barcode generator (Playwright).

scripts.test:full: npm run test:comprehensive && npm run test:review
scripts.test:launch: playwright test tests/domain-ads-config.spec.js tests/seo.spec.js tests/smoke.spec.js tests/a11y.spec.js tests/m25-account.spec.js tests/print-layout.spec.js tests/production-crawl.spec.js --project=chromium
